chapter_title.en: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)

text: 5781 - سِبَابُ اَلْمُؤْمِنِ فُسُوقٌ قِتَالُ اَلْمُؤْمِنِ كُفْرٌ أَكْلُ لَحْمِهِ مِنْ مَعْصِيَةِ اَللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ حُرْمَةُ مَالِهِ كَحُرْمَةِ دَمِهِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.5781 - The Prophet (sw) said; "Insulting a believer is wickedness, fighting a believer is disbelief, consuming his flesh (backbiting) is disobedience to Allah (swt), the Mighty and Majestic, and the sanctity of his wealth is like the sanctity of his blood."
